name: Greer CSETI
description: The Center for the Study of Extraterrestrial Intelligence (CSETI), founded by Steven M. Greer, is an organization dedicated to establishing peaceful contact with extraterrestrial civilizations through a process known as Close Encounters of the Fifth Kind (CE-5). Greer claims CE-5 protocols, involving meditation, focused intention, and coordinated observation, can summon UFOs and initiate contact. He asserts that governments are suppressing evidence of extraterrestrial contact and advanced technologies, and that CSETI aims to bypass this secrecy. Proponents cite personal experiences, photographs, and videos as evidence. Mainstream science dismisses CSETI's claims due to a lack of verifiable, repeatable scientific evidence. Skeptics argue that the observed phenomena are misidentified natural objects, psychological projections, or outright hoaxes. Greer's methods are criticized for lacking scientific rigor and for relying on subjective interpretations and anecdotal evidence. Furthermore, his financial practices and alleged promotion of unsubstantiated technologies have raised concerns within the UFO research community. While CSETI has attracted a devoted following, its claims remain largely unverified and are not accepted by the scientific community.
subtitle: Contacting ETs through focused intention

claims.evidence: Personal experiences, photographs, and videos from CE-5 events.
claims.criticism: Lack of controlled experiments, subjective interpretation of data, potential for misidentification of natural phenomena.

claims.claim: Governments are suppressing evidence of extraterrestrial contact.
claims.evidence: Whistleblower testimonies, classified documents (often of questionable authenticity).
claims.criticism: Lack of conclusive proof, alternative explanations for alleged cover-ups (e.g., national security concerns, preventing mass panic).

claims.evidence: Testimonies, alleged leaked documents, claims of reverse-engineered alien technology.
claims.criticism: Lack of verifiable evidence, reliance on anecdotal accounts, potential for misinterpreting conventional technology.

keyFigures.name: Steven M. Greer
keyFigures.role: Founder of CSETI and prominent advocate of CE-5 protocols.

keyFigures.name: Michael Shermer
keyFigures.role: Skeptic and science writer who has critiqued claims of extraterrestrial contact and conspiracy theories.

timeline.event: Greer organizes the Disclosure Project, featuring whistleblower testimonies.

sources.author: Steven M. Greer
sources.work: Unacknowledged: An Exposé of the World's Greatest Secret
sources.title: Steven M. Greer

sources.author: Curtis Peebles
sources.work: Watch the Skies!: A Chronicle of the Flying Saucer Myth
sources.title: Curtis Peebles

variants: Center for the Study of Extraterrestrial Intelligence
Close Encounters of the Fifth Kind
